The Artist
About Reuu
"I limit myself to just a pencil and an eraser — not as a restriction, but as a commitment to mastery."

My name is Reuben Nathaniel Juen, known online as Reuu. I'm a self-driven graphite artist specializing in portrait work — from quick expressive sketches to deeply detailed, hyperrealistic pieces.

I deliberately work with only two tools: a pencil and an eraser. No blending stumps, no digital aids, no charcoal. Just graphite, paper, and patience. This constraint pushes me to develop control, nuance, and a deep understanding of light and shadow.

Every portrait I draw is personal — an attempt to capture not just a face, but the feeling of a person.

Pencil Only Eraser Only A4 Paper Graphite Art Portrait Specialist
